Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Subspace]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Subspace is an isolated pocket where targets of the Absolute Burial spell are sent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — Karoshan ships can dive into Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The mountain was sealed in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Subspace is a dimension or state that Omega can slide in and out of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Subspace is a pocket dimension.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The ship can dive into Subspace to evade enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Accurate long-distance transportation is considered impossible without going through Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — Omega can use Subspace to travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — Turrets on Horizon manifest out of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — Ships can emerge from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — Subspace is a dimension or state that ships can emerge from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — Subspace is a place or state that reality can twist into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Horizon uses sealing magic to protect the ship in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — Omega can materialize from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — Subspace is a place one can dive into to avoid annihilation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — Subspace is a multicolored twist that ships can escape through.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Subspace is a region where astral megafauna stalk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The bridge of The Last Horizon is located in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Mundane materials can prevent a ship from sinking into Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — Subspace is a medium through which ships travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — Subspace is an extra-dimensional space where prediction does not work precisely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — To attack the Grand Hive successfully, one must enter Subspace from outside the Iron King's range of awareness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — The crew plans to dive back to Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The Last Horizon emerged from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Subspace is a dimension or area that characters can enter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — Subspace is a place or state that creatures can flee into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Half of the Grand Hive was drawn into Subspace.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 1''' — Subspace is a state or dimension that Starhammer must avoid entering while carrying unprotected civilians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Subspace is a location or state where calling Divine Titans is tricky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — Subspace is a medium through which the Lichborn heavy shuttle traveled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — Subspace is a chaotic realm that can cause madness in organic life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Mell can return the ship to Subspace in a couple of hours.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — Subspace is a dimension or method of travel used by fleets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — Starhammer exited Subspace early.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — The Shadow Ark imploded into Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Subspace is a multicolored river of chaos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Subspace can distort sound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Omega uses Subspace storage to hold his gun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Subspace interference caused inconclusive footage of Varic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Subspace can cause mortals to warp and twist in strange dimensions.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — Subspace is a place where Omega stores his guns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Subspace is a medium or dimension that certain spells can reach through.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Subspace is a location where entities can be attacked and sent off-course.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — Fleets can be kept in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The characters will be in Subspace for a while.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Subspace is a dimension or route used for travel that can be blocked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Subspace is a method of travel and contains a void that is cold and hungry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — Javik can summon a two-handed cannon from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The Green Knight's Divine Titan falls from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — The narrator commands the ship to dive into Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Subspace warps can bloom in outer space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — The crew's objective is to reach Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Subspace can be accessed via a rupture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Subspace is a realm that can be entered via a Subspace warp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — Soldier ants emerge from Subspace on shimmering magical wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — Raion was believed to be in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The D’Niss used a method of Subspace travel to move.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — Aila can pull items from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Omega can drop into Subspace to avoid telekinesis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Aila's clones used Subspace to dive into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Subspace is a state or dimension that The Last Horizon can enter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Vallenar crew surfaced from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The surface of Subspace is made of pure darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — The Aether Core preserves enough Aether to allow the use of magic in Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Subspace existence is inherently unstable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — The characters have insights on the creatures of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — The Captain can lock individuals into Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Subspace is a state or dimension that ships can be out of while waiting for their Drive to stabilize.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — A Subspace warp blooms just outside Fathom’s atmosphere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Nameless abominations originate from the depths of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Sola's missiles emerge from Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Subspace is a dark pocket that can be accessed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Subspace contains rainbow colors beneath its shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Subspace is a dimension that shines through cracks in shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Reception in Subspace is not good.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Subspace is a place with sanity-shattering depths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 38''' — Subspace is a dimension or state that Benri felt drawn into during his descent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Subspace is a destination or state Benri cannot reach if the door is warped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Subspace is a unique fold of reality used for isolation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Subspace is a medium that certain enemies can pass through as individuals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Subspace can be viewed through a feed routed into a helmet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Subspace contains patterns of yellow lights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Omega might bolt into Subspace.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
